name: @ownloom/wiki
description: Portable plain-Markdown LLM wiki CLI and core tools.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run typecheck && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --outfile=dist/cli.cjs && esbuild src/api.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --outfile=dist/api.cjs
